results.original_condition: A draft document exists for the logged-in user's personal team, with at least one recipient added

results.description: Single draft envelope scoped to team 7 with a recipient
commands: psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"DocumentData\" (id, type, data, \"initialData\") VALUES ('verify-spike4-docdata-001', 'BYTES_64', '', '');" -c "INSERT INTO \"DocumentMeta\" (id, subject, message, timezone, \"dateFormat\", \"signingOrder\", \"typedSignatureEnabled\", \"uploadSignatureEnabled\", \"drawSignatureEnabled\") VALUES ('verify-spike4-docmeta-001', '', '', 'Etc/UTC', 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm a', 'PARALLEL', true, true, true);" -c "INSERT INTO \"Envelope\" (id, \"type\", \"title\", \"status\", \"userId\", \"teamId\", \"documentMetaId\", \"createdAt\", \"updatedAt\") VALUES (1001, 'DOCUMENT', 'Draft Test Document', 'DRAFT', 9, 7, 'verify-spike4-docmeta-001', NOW(), NOW());" -c "INSERT INTO \"EnvelopeItem\" (id, title, \"order\", \"documentDataId\", \"envelopeId\") VALUES (1001, 'Draft Test Document', 0, 'verify-spike4-docdata-001', 1001);" -c "INSERT INTO \"Recipient\" (\"envelopeId\", email, name, token, role, \"readStatus\", \"signingStatus\", \"sendStatus\") VALUES (1001, 'recipient1@test.documenso.com', 'Test Recipient', 'verify-spike4-recip-token-001', 'SIGNER', 'NOT_OPENED', 'NOT_SIGNED', 'NOT_SENT');"
